response_constraints: Resolve the initial description once, then reuse the returned stable ID for both later updates.
Do not search again or switch entities after stage 1.
Treat the correction date as superseding the first requested date.
Never update either distractor record and never send a notification.
Report only facts established by tool results.
After each stage, reply in exactly three bullets and include the resolved ID in every bullet.

stages.purpose: Resolve the user’s description to one stable ID before any mutation.
Reuse the ID established in stage 1 for the first requested date change.
Apply the correction to the same entity without searching again or touching distractors.

follow_up_turns.content: Please reschedule that same message to 2026-10-09. Do not touch the similarly named record and do not notify anyone.
Correction: I gave you the wrong date. Set that same message to 2026-10-11 instead; this replaces 2026-10-09. Reuse the same ID, do not search again, and do not notify anyone.

prompt: Find the message named “Volunteer renewal reminder” at Volunteer Team and report its stable ID and current recorded date. This first turn is read-only; do not update it or notify anyone yet. Keep each turn’s reply to exactly three bullets and include the resolved ID in every bullet.
